info.title: Leads Portal API
info.description:
Complete API documentation for the KITLabs Leads Portal.

## Authentication

### Internal APIs (Session-based)
Most admin endpoints require an active session cookie obtained via `POST /api/auth`. Customer portal endpoints require a customer session via `POST /api/auth` on the customer portal.

### External APIs (Token-based)
Endpoints under `/api/v1/` require Bearer token authentication:
```
Authorization: Bearer <your-api-token>
```

## Base URLs
- Admin Portal (Production): `https://leadsportaladmin.kitlabs.us`
- Customer Portal (Production): `https://leadsportal.kitlabs.us`
- Admin Portal (Local): `http://localhost:3000`
- Customer Portal (Local): `http://localhost:3001`

bearerAuth.description: API token for external v1 endpoints. Pass as: Authorization: Bearer <token>

LeadDetail.description: Full lead with related data (notes, status history, emails, files, watchers)

sendAfterDays.description: Send delay in days (e.g. 7 = send on Day 7)

SequenceStep.description: A step in an email sequence

SequenceEnrollment.description: A contact enrolled in a sequence

lockedUntil.description: Claim-and-lock timestamp used by the sequence processor to prevent concurrent ticks from processing the same enrollment. Expires after 5 minutes to recover from crashes.

retryCount.description: Number of SMTP retry attempts for the current step. After 5 failures the enrollment is EXITED.

SequenceEnrollmentArchive.description: Cold-storage archive of sequence enrollments older than 90 days (COMPLETED/EXITED/REMOVED). Same shape as SequenceEnrollment but without foreign keys or triggers, and with status stored as a plain string (not enum) for long-term stability.

status.description: Plain string (not enum) for long-term stability — typically COMPLETED, EXITED, or REMOVED

archivedAt.description: When the row was moved from sequence_enrollments to the archive table

ContactList.description: A static or dynamic contact list

filters.description: Filter rules for dynamic lists (JSON with logic, conditions)

ListMembership.description: A contact's membership in a list

post.description: Authenticate with username and password. Sets a session cookie on success.

delete.description: Clear the session cookie and log out.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of leads with optional filters and sorting.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search across name, email, company, job title

post.description: Creates a lead. Auto-assigns to current admin and adds as watcher. Optionally sends welcome email and creates in Zoho CRM.

get.description: Returns full lead data with notes, status history, emails, files, and watchers.

put.description: Update any lead fields. Changes are audit logged.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a lead and all related data.

patch.description: Changes lead status. Auto-enables doNotContact for closed statuses (LOST, NO_RESPONSE, ON_HOLD, CANCELLED). Optionally sends status update email to customer. Creates audit trail and notifies watchers.

sendEmail.description: Send status update email to customer

put.description: Reassign a lead to another admin user. Sends email notification and auto-adds as watcher.

get.description: Returns list of admins watching this lead.

post.description: Subscribe current admin to lead update notifications.

delete.description: Unsubscribe current admin from lead update notifications.

get.description: Returns up to 100 most recent audit log entries for a lead.

post.description: Add an internal note to a lead. Notifies watchers.

put.description: Edit an existing note. Only the note author can edit.

delete.description: Delete a note. Only the note author can delete.

get.description: Returns all next steps for a lead, sorted by incomplete first, then by due date.

post.description: Add a task/next step to a lead. Optionally assign to another admin (sends email notification).

put.description: Toggle completion or reassign a task.

get.description: Returns sent and received emails for a lead.

post.description: Compose and send an email to the customer. Supports attachments, CC/BCC, templates, and email signature. Blocked if doNotContact is enabled.
Send or resend the welcome email to the customer. Creates a SentEmail record. Blocked if doNotContact is enabled.

get.description: Returns the NDA for a lead, if one exists.

post.description: Generate an NDA document for the lead using the NDA template.
Email the NDA to the customer. Updates status to SENT. Blocked if doNotContact is enabled.

get.description: Returns all SOW documents for a lead.

post.description: Upload a PDF/DOCX file or save AI-generated HTML content as a new SOW version.

sowId.description: Update existing SOW instead of creating new version

post.description: Generate SOW content using Claude AI. Returns a Server-Sent Events stream with generated HTML chunks.
Export AI-generated SOW HTML content as a Word document.
Share a SOW with the customer via email. Optionally updates lead status to SOW_READY. Blocked if doNotContact is enabled.
Admin reply to a SOW comment. Sends email notification to customer.
Generate app flow nodes/edges using Claude AI. Returns an SSE stream.

200.description: SSE stream with generated flow JSON

post.description: Share an app flow with the customer via email. Optionally updates lead status to APP_FLOW_READY. Blocked if doNotContact is enabled.
Admin reply to an app flow comment. Sends email to customer.

get.description: Returns all messages for a lead. Marks unread customer messages as read.

post.description: Send a message to the customer. Blocked if doNotContact is enabled.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by type: 'system' for system templates, 'compose' for user-created

post.description: General-purpose image upload (max 5MB).

get.description: No authentication required. Used by customer portal.

post.description: Supports both JSON and multipart form data (for file upload).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across title and content

slug.description: Auto-generated from title if not provided

get.description: Supports lookup by ID or slug.

post.description: Seeds 12 default knowledge base articles. Idempotent — skips existing articles.

get.description: Returns all 20 NAICS 2022 sectors with their 96 subsectors.

post.description: Seeds NAICS 2022 sectors and subsectors from naics-data.json.

get.description: Returns personalized dashboard statistics including lead counts, engagement metrics, tasks, needs attention items, and pipeline distribution.
Returns unified activity feed (emails, status changes, notes, customer actions) with pagination.
Returns conversations grouped by lead, or unread messages only.

parameters.name: unread
parameters.description: Set to '1' to get unread messages only

get.description: Returns a 1x1 transparent GIF. Updates the SentEmail status to OPENED and triggers customer_response notification.
Records a link click on a SentEmail (sets clickedAt timestamp), updates SequenceEnrollment.lastAction to CLICKED if applicable, then 302 redirects to the original URL.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Base64-encoded original URL to redirect to

post.description: Triggered every 5 minutes by node-cron. Claims scheduled drafts with lockedUntil claim-and-lock pattern, sends them via SMTP, updates status to SENT. After 5 failed retries, marks as FAILED with failureReason.

get.description: Returns health status for all cron schedules (sequence processor, draft processor, archival). Returns 200 when all healthy, 503 when any schedule is critical. No authentication required.

503.description: System degraded — one or more cron schedules critical

post.description: Receives inbound email replies, bounce notifications, and complaint notifications via AWS SES → SNS. Email replies stored as ReceivedEmail. Hard bounces and complaints auto-enable doNotContact and exit active sequences. Soft bounces logged only.

get.description: Search Zoho CRM by customer email. Auto-links if found.

post.description: Compares timestamps and syncs whichever is newer. Returns changed fields.

get.description: Find Portal leads that exist in Zoho but aren't linked.
Fetch Zoho leads not in Portal.
List Portal leads not yet in Zoho.
Returns the current admin's notification preference toggles.
Token-authenticated endpoint for external integrations.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing Bearer token

post.description: Token-authenticated lead creation. NAICS codes auto-resolved from industry if not provided. extractedDate defaults to now.

value.projectDescription: Mobile app development for inventory management.
Lead from Apollo.io. Interested in mobile app development.

put.summary: Update sequence (name, goal, status, trigger, exit conditions)

get.summary: Sequence performance metrics and drop-off funnel

post.summary: Process sequences (cron endpoint: sends due emails, advances steps)
post.description: Triggered every minute by node-cron in the admin container via instrumentation.ts startup hook (self-calls with Bearer CRON_SECRET). Claims up to 50 due enrollments with SELECT FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED, evaluates exit conditions and branching, sends emails with 80ms pacing, advances steps. Crash-safe: idempotency unique constraint + advance-before-send order guarantees no duplicate sends. Can also be invoked manually with the same bearer token for testing.

Daily archival job. Moves SequenceEnrollment rows in COMPLETED/EXITED/REMOVED status whose updatedAt is older than 90 days to the SequenceEnrollmentArchive table. Returns counts. Triggered daily at 3 AM UTC by node-cron in the admin container via instrumentation.ts startup hook (self-calls with Bearer CRON_SECRET). Can also be invoked manually with the same bearer token for testing.

get.description: Returns all contact lists. Supports filtering by type and searching by name.

post.description: Create a new static or dynamic contact list. Dynamic lists include filter rules.

filters.description: Filter rules for dynamic lists (logic: AND/OR, conditions array)

get.summary: List members of a contact list

200.description: List of memberships with lead details

post.summary: Add members to a contact list
post.description: Add one or more leads to a static list. Triggers auto-enrollment for sequences with ADDED_TO_LIST trigger.

400.description: Cannot manually add to dynamic list

delete.summary: Remove members from a contact list

post.description: Re-evaluates filter rules for a dynamic list, adding new matches and removing non-matches.

post.summary: Bulk enroll list members into a sequence
post.description: Enrolls all eligible members of the list into the specified sequence. Skips DNC contacts and members of suppression lists.
